description: The Al-Zein crime family is a prominent Mhallami mafia organization primarily based in Germany, involved in drug trafficking, armed robbery, arms trafficking, assault, extortion, fraud, money laundering, kidnapping, and murder. It has an estimated membership of 15,000 individuals and operates across Europe, the Middle East, and the United States. The clan originated from the Mhallami ethnic group from the Syrian-Turkish border region, migrating to Lebanon in the 1930s and then to Germany in the 1980s.

country_links.evidence_quote: the clan has members throughout Europe and the Middle East, for example in Sweden, Denmark, the Netherlands and Turkey.
country_links.context: The clan has members reported in Denmark.

country_links.evidence_quote: The clan has branches in Malmö , Hässleholm , Landskrona , Lomma , and Perstorp .
country_links.context: The clan has branches in several Swedish cities and is one of the most prominent family-based criminal networks in Malmö.
